CustomField.formula: IF(ISPICKVAL( Grant_funded_capital_costs_RAG__c, "Amber"), 1, 0) + IF(ISPICKVAL( Grant_funded_A_A_costs_RAG__c, "Amber"), 1, 0) + IF(ISPICKVAL( Total_grant_funding_RAG__c, "Amber"), 1, 0) + IF(ISPICKVAL( Co_funded_capital_costs_RAG__c, "Amber"), 1, 0) + IF(ISPICKVAL( Total_co_funding_RAG__c, "Amber"), 1, 0) + IF(ISPICKVAL( Total_capital_costs_RAG__c, "Amber"), 1, 0) + IF(ISPICKVAL( Total_A_A_costs_RAG__c, "Amber"), 1, 0)
CustomField.label: Homes & Costs - Total Amber
